title: Architecture Spec Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of specs/architecture.md. The MasterOrchestrator reads this frontmatter to determine DAG structure (layer_count, dag_tasks) and to verify that all stack components are documented before DAG construction begins.

version.description: Semantic version of this spec document (e.g. '1.0.0').

stack_components.description: List of technology stack components. At least one component must be documented before the MasterOrchestrator constructs the DAG.

layer_count.description: Number of architectural layers defined in the layered architecture diagram. Minimum 2 (must have at least two distinct layers).

dag_tasks.description: Number of tasks that will be generated in the MasterOrchestrator DAG for this project.

validated.description: Whether the frontmatter has been validated by tools/validate-specs.py.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last successful validation.
